name: Example: Zeno's dichotomy
slot1_objects: Half-line motion problems parameterized by step count n.
slot2_observables: Distance-covered-after-n-steps d(n) : N -> R, with single observable 'is the task complete?'
slot3_note: Separation fails on the joint map: 'never complete at any finite n' and 'complete in the limit' are both in the image of d(-), and no added observable among the pre-infinitary ones distinguishes them until we admit limits (Type I fix = add the limit as an observable).
